scripts.cap:dev: npm run patch:android && cp capacitor.config.dev.ts capacitor.config.ts && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:prod: npm run patch:android && cp capacitor.config.prod.ts capacitor.config.ts && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:dev: npm run patch:android && cp capacitor.config.dev.ts capacitor.config.ts && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:prod: npm run patch:android && cp capacitor.config.prod.ts capacitor.config.ts && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.aab:prod: npm run patch:android && cp capacitor.config.prod.ts capacitor.config.ts && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
